title: Rain on the Window
description: A cozy scene with gentle rain

content.text: Picture this... *pause* ...you're in a cozy room. Maybe it's a cabin, maybe it's a loft, somewhere that feels perfectly safe.
Outside, rain is falling... *pause* ...not a storm, just a gentle, steady rain. You can hear it on the roof... *soft* ...tap, tap, tap.
You're wrapped in the softest blanket... *pause* ...it's warm, and it smells like lavender, or maybe cedar. Something comforting.
There's a window nearby... *pause* ...and you watch the raindrops trace paths down the glass. Each one finding its own way. No rush.
Listen to the rain... *pause* ...it's like a lullaby the sky is singing. It's been singing this song forever... *pause* ...and it will keep singing after you sleep.
You pull the blanket closer... *soft breath* ...your eyes are getting heavy. The rain keeps falling. You're so warm.
The world outside is wet and cool... *pause* ...but you're dry, you're safe, you're held. *trailing* The rain keeps falling...
Let the sound carry you... *whisper* ...tap, tap, tap... *pause* ...into sleep... *long pause* ...into dreams...
